shell.unsubscribe_prompt: Ma dooneysid emaylo sidan oo kale ah?

plan_upgrade.subject: Ku soo dhawoow {planName}, {firstName}!
plan_upgrade.heading: Salaan {firstName}, ku soo dhawoow {planName}!
plan_upgrade.body: Aad ayaan ugu faraxsanahay inaad kor u qaadatay. Waa kuwan waxa hadda kuu shaqeeyay:
plan_upgrade.closing: Haddii wax ku saabsan {planName} aanu u shaqeynin sidaad u baahan tahay, kaliya uga jawaab emaylkan — anigu shaqsi ahaan waan hubin doonaa in la hagaajiyo.

pos_welcome.subject: Ku soo dhawoow AskBiz POS, {firstName}!
pos_welcome.heading: Salaan {firstName}, ku soo dhawoow AskBiz POS!
pos_welcome.body1: Aad ayaan ugu faraxsanahay inaad ku dartay AskBiz POS — ku soo dhawoow qoyska.
pos_welcome.body2: Kaash-registerkaaga, la-socodka kaydkaaga, iyo warbixinta dhammaadka maalinta ayaa hadda toos ah, si toos ah oo la barbar ah inta kale ee akoonkaaga AskBiz.
pos_welcome.closing: Haddii wax aanu u shaqeynin sidaad u baahan tahay, kaliya uga jawaab emaylkan — anigu shaqsi ahaan waan hubin doonaa in la hagaajiyo.

growth: Isku-xirid xog toos ah (Shopify, Stripe, Sheets)
business: Fayl aan xad lahayn la soo geliyo
Qiimaha qaataha hore — la damaanad qaaday weligeed
enterprise: Wax kasta oo aan xad lahayn
